description: Task and project management server for TickTick, enabling OAuth2 authentication, project CRUD operations, and task management including creation, updates, completion, and deletion.

tools.name: ticktick_oauth2_authorization_step1
tools.description: Generate a TickTick OAuth2 authorization URL to redirect the user for obtaining an authorization code.

scope.description: Space-separated permission scopes for the authorization request. Available scopes: 'tasks:read', 'tasks:write'.

client_id.description: The TickTick application's client ID obtained from the Developer Center.

redirect_uri.description: The exact redirect URI registered with the TickTick application for OAuth2 callback.

state.description: An opaque value used for CSRF protection and maintaining request state across the authorization flow.

authorization_url.description: The fully constructed OAuth2 authorization URL to redirect the user for granting permissions.

tools.name: ticktick_get_user_project
tools.description: Retrieve all projects belonging to the authenticated user.

projects.description: List of all projects owned by the authenticated user.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project.

name.description: The display name of the project.

color.description: The hex color code assigned to the project for visual identification.

kind.description: The type of the project, indicating whether it contains tasks or notes.

tools.name: ticktick_get_project_with_data
tools.description: Retrieve a specific project along with its associated tasks and columns.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project to retrieve data for.
The unique identifier of the project.

name.description: The display name of the project.

tasks.description: List of tasks contained within the project.

columns.description: List of columns or sections defined within the project for task organization.

tools.name: ticktick_create_project
tools.description: Create a new project in TickTick with specified configuration options.

name.description: The display name for the new project.

kind.description: The type of the project, such as 'TASK' or 'NOTE'.

color.description: The hex color code for the project (e.g., '#F18181') for visual identification.

viewMode.description: The view mode configuration for displaying the project.

sortOrder.description: The numeric sort order value determining the project's position in lists.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the newly created project.

name.description: The display name of the project.

color.description: The hex color code assigned to the project for visual identification.

kind.description: The type of the project, indicating whether it contains tasks or notes.

tools.name: ticktick_update_project
tools.description: Update an existing project's properties such as name, color, or view settings.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project to update.

name.description: The new display name for the project.

kind.description: The type of the project, either 'TASK' or 'NOTE'.

color.description: The hex color code for the project (e.g., '#F18181') for visual identification.

viewMode.description: The view mode configuration for displaying the project.

sortOrder.description: The numeric sort order value determining the project's position in lists.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the updated project.

name.description: The display name of the project.

color.description: The hex color code assigned to the project for visual identification.

kind.description: The type of the project, indicating whether it contains tasks or notes.

tools.name: ticktick_delete_project
tools.description: Permanently delete a specific project and all its associated data.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project to delete.
The unique identifier of the deleted project.

deleted.description: Indicates whether the project was successfully deleted.

tools.name: ticktick_create_task
tools.description: Create a new task in TickTick with specified title, project assignment, and optional details.

title.description: The title or name of the task to create.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project to add the task to.

notes.description: The main content or notes associated with the task.

description.description: An extended description providing additional details about the task.

due_date.description: The due date and time for the task in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2023-04-24T17:00:00+0000').

priority.description: The priority level of the task (0=None, 1=Low, 3=Medium, 5=High).

taskId.description: The unique identifier of the newly created task.

title.description: The title or name of the task.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project containing the task.

dueDate.description: The due date and time assigned to the task in ISO 8601 format.

priority.description: The priority level of the task (0=None, 1=Low, 3=Medium, 5=High).

tools.name: ticktick_update_task
tools.description: Update an existing task's properties such as title, notes, due date, or priority.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task to update.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project containing the task.

title.description: The new title or name for the task.

notes.description: The main content or notes associated with the task.

description.description: An extended description providing additional details about the task.

due_date.description: The due date and time for the task in ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2023-04-24T17:00:00+0000').

priority.description: The priority level of the task (0=None, 1=Low, 3=Medium, 5=High).

taskId.description: The unique identifier of the updated task.

title.description: The title or name of the task.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project containing the task.

dueDate.description: The due date and time assigned to the task in ISO 8601 format.

priority.description: The priority level of the task (0=None, 1=Low, 3=Medium, 5=High).

tools.name: ticktick_complete_task
tools.description: Mark a specific task as complete within its project.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task to mark as complete.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project containing the task.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the completed task.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project containing the task.

status.description: The current completion status of the task after the operation.

tools.name: ticktick_delete_task
tools.description: Permanently delete a specific task from a project.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the task to delete.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project containing the task to delete.

task_id.description: The unique identifier of the deleted task.

project_id.description: The unique identifier of the project that contained the deleted task.

deleted.description: Indicates whether the task was successfully deleted.
